🔗 Share View-Only Link
Anyone with this link can view the dashboard and apply their own filters. They cannot upload or edit data.
✓ View-only access: All filters are available so recipients can drill down to their own team, city, or FSE type.
✓ No data editing: Upload button is hidden for view-only recipients.
ℹ️ To reshare with updated data: Upload new Excel first, then share this link again.
